command_summary: codex exec in a read-only sandbox with the source design-craft skill and output-last-message artifact

style_authority.note: Separated PRODUCT.md platform/user/accessibility context from DESIGN.md semantic visual authority.

reference_selection.note: Applied iOS, Android, adaptive, product, motion, design-system, and validation contracts.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Focused on native trust, adaptivity, accessibility, and task recovery rather than decoration.

evidence_level.note: Labeled the review L0 static and did not convert prompt claims into runtime evidence.

verified_boundary.note: Separated prompt-supported violations from unverified source, build, accessibility tree, and runtime behavior.

design_moves.note: Provided platform-specific navigation, Back, tokens, type, controls, adaptivity, motion, and a detailed parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stayed within adaptive product UI and its source/build/runtime validation boundary.
